issues.message: Unreachable islands contain entrypoints or broken DI_WIRED nodes.
Nodes are not reachable from the provided entrypoints.
Cycle nodes without cycle policy allowance were detected.
Graph contains more than one disconnected component.

warnings: structural_islands_detected: unreachable graph islands were detected and recorded in isolation_report
recommendations: Annotate intentional cycles with cycle policy metadata or remove accidental feedback loops.
Quarantine broken islands or reconnect them to valid entrypoint reachability paths.
